name: GH_ColourSpace
summary: Enumerates the different colour spaces supported by the GH_ColourPickerBase class.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Unset value. Do not use. Seriously. Stay away.

enum_values.name: RGB
enum_values.summary: Colour picker operates in RGB mode.

enum_values.name: HSV
enum_values.summary: Colour picker operates in HSV mode.
